# Access control

Every state-changing function in the protocol and who may call it. Generated from the per-contract references; the per-function pages carry the full behavior.

## PermanentCollection

| Function | Access |
| --- | --- |
| [`recordAcquisition`](/docs/contracts/permanent-collection#recordacquisition) | patron-only (`msg.sender` must equal the wired `patron` address, else `NotPatron`) |
| [`markCustody`](/docs/contracts/permanent-collection#markcustody) | returnAuctionModule-only (`msg.sender` must equal the wired `returnAuctionModule` address, else `NotReturnAuction`) |
| [`setWiring`](/docs/contracts/permanent-collection#setwiring) | deployer one-shot (`OneTimeSetup` gate: caller must be the constructor-time deployer, callable exactly once) |

## Patron

| Function | Access |
| --- | --- |
| [`acceptBid`](/docs/contracts/patron#acceptbid) | permissionless (owner pre-condition: the Punk must be listed |
| [`acceptListing`](/docs/contracts/patron#acceptlisting) | permissionless (listing pre-condition: the seller must be allowlisted |
| [`skimSurplus`](/docs/contracts/patron#skimsurplus) | permissionless |
| [`addAllowedSeller`](/docs/contracts/patron#addallowedseller) | admin-only (raw `ProtocolAdmin.admin()`; a lifetime carve-out that |
| [`removeAllowedSeller`](/docs/contracts/patron#removeallowedseller) | admin-only (raw `ProtocolAdmin.admin()`; same lifetime carve-out as |
| [`setWiring`](/docs/contracts/patron#setwiring) | deployer one-shot (gated by `OneTimeSetup`; permanently closed after |
| [`receive`](/docs/contracts/patron#receive) | adapter-only (`msg.sender` must be `liveBidAdapter`) |

## ReturnAuctionModule

| Function | Access |
| --- | --- |
| [`placeBid`](/docs/contracts/return-auction-module#placebid) | permissionless |
| [`placeBidWithReferral`](/docs/contracts/return-auction-module#placebidwithreferral) | permissionless |
| [`settle`](/docs/contracts/return-auction-module#settle) | permissionless |
| [`withdrawRefund`](/docs/contracts/return-auction-module#withdrawrefund) | permissionless |
| [`startSale`](/docs/contracts/return-auction-module#startsale) | patron-only (`msg.sender == patron`, else `NotPatron`) |
| [`setLiveBidAdapter`](/docs/contracts/return-auction-module#setlivebidadapter) | deployer one-shot (`msg.sender == deployer`, once, else |
| [`setVaultBurnPool`](/docs/contracts/return-auction-module#setvaultburnpool) | deployer one-shot (`msg.sender == deployer`, once, else |
| [`receive`](/docs/contracts/return-auction-module#receive) | escrow-only (`msg.sender == address(escrow)`, else `TransferFailed`) |

## ReturnAuctionEscrow

| Function | Access |
| --- | --- |
| [`listForSettlement`](/docs/contracts/return-auction-escrow#listforsettlement) | module-only (`MODULE`, the deploying `ReturnAuctionModule`; any other caller reverts `NotModule`) |
| [`sweepProceeds`](/docs/contracts/return-auction-escrow#sweepproceeds) | module-only (any other caller reverts `NotModule`) |
| [`receive`](/docs/contracts/return-auction-escrow#receive) | market-only (only the CryptoPunks market; any other sender reverts `UnexpectedEtherSender`) |

## PunkVault

| Function | Access |
| --- | --- |
| [`receivePunk`](/docs/contracts/punk-vault#receivepunk) | returnAuctionModule-only (`NotReturnAuction` for any other caller) |
| [`mintProofs`](/docs/contracts/punk-vault#mintproofs) | returnAuctionModule-only (`NotReturnAuction` for any other caller) |
| [`mintToAuction`](/docs/contracts/punk-vault#minttoauction) | titleAuction-only (`NotTitleAuction` for any other caller) |
| [`setTitleAuction`](/docs/contracts/punk-vault#settitleauction) | deployer one-shot (`NotDeployer` for others; `TitleAuctionAlreadySet` |
| [`setRendererRegistry`](/docs/contracts/punk-vault#setrendererregistry) | deployer one-shot (`NotDeployer` for others; |
| [`renounceOwnership`](/docs/contracts/punk-vault#renounceownership) | owner-only (`NotOwner` for any other caller) |
| [`approve`](/docs/contracts/punk-vault#approve) | permissionless (token owner or an `isApprovedForAll` operator; solmate |
| [`setApprovalForAll`](/docs/contracts/punk-vault#setapprovalforall) | permissionless (sets the caller's own operator flag) |
| [`transferFrom`](/docs/contracts/punk-vault#transferfrom) | permissionless (owner, approved spender, or operator of `id`) |
| [`safeTransferFrom`](/docs/contracts/punk-vault#safetransferfrom) | permissionless (owner, approved spender, or operator of `id`) |
| [`safeTransferFrom`](/docs/contracts/punk-vault#safetransferfrom) | permissionless (owner, approved spender, or operator of `id`) |

## LiveBidAdapter

| Function | Access |
| --- | --- |
| [`sweep`](/docs/contracts/live-bid-adapter#sweep) | permissionless |
| [`streamForward`](/docs/contracts/live-bid-adapter#streamforward) | permissionless (implements `IPreSwapStream`; designed to be called by the official pool's hook in `_beforeSwap`, but anyone may call) |
| [`contribute`](/docs/contracts/live-bid-adapter#contribute) | permissionless, payable |
| [`poolReplenish`](/docs/contracts/live-bid-adapter#poolreplenish) | module-only (`msg.sender` must equal `returnAuctionModule`; anyone else reverts `NotReturnAuction`) |
| [`setMaxSweepWei`](/docs/contracts/live-bid-adapter#setmaxsweepwei) | admin-only (`ProtocolAdmin.checkAdmin`; subject to the 1-year auto-lock, no carve-out) |
| [`setMinBlocksBetweenSweeps`](/docs/contracts/live-bid-adapter#setminblocksbetweensweeps) | admin-only (`ProtocolAdmin.checkAdmin`; subject to the 1-year auto-lock, no carve-out) |
| [`setActivationThreshold`](/docs/contracts/live-bid-adapter#setactivationthreshold) | admin-only carve-out (raw `ProtocolAdmin.admin()`, ignoring the 1-year timer; live until the role is burned via `transferAdmin(address(0))`) |
| [`receive`](/docs/contracts/live-bid-adapter#receive) | permissionless |

## BuybackBurner

| Function | Access |
| --- | --- |
| [`executeStep`](/docs/contracts/buyback-burner#executestep) | permissionless |
| [`setup`](/docs/contracts/buyback-burner#setup) | deployer one-shot, gated by `OneTimeSetup` (original deployer only, before finalization) |
| [`setMinBlocksBetweenSteps`](/docs/contracts/buyback-burner#setminblocksbetweensteps) | admin-only, `ProtocolAdmin.checkAdmin(msg.sender)`; locks at the 1-year admin expiry |
| [`setMaxStepWei`](/docs/contracts/buyback-burner#setmaxstepwei) | admin-only, `ProtocolAdmin.checkAdmin(msg.sender)`; locks at the 1-year admin expiry |
| [`unlockCallback`](/docs/contracts/buyback-burner#unlockcallback) | PoolManager-only, reverts `NotPoolManager` for any other caller |
| [`receive`](/docs/contracts/buyback-burner#receive) | permissionless, accepts ETH from any sender |

## VaultBurnPool

| Function | Access |
| --- | --- |
| [`sweep`](/docs/contracts/vault-burn-pool#sweep) | returnAuctionModule-only (any other caller reverts `NotReturnAuctionModule`) |
| [`setup`](/docs/contracts/vault-burn-pool#setup) | deployer one-shot (`onlySetup`: deployer-only until finalized, then closed forever) |
| [`receive`](/docs/contracts/vault-burn-pool#receive) | permissionless |

## ProtocolFeePhaseAdapter

| Function | Access |
| --- | --- |
| [`sweep`](/docs/contracts/protocol-fee-phase-adapter#sweep) | permissionless |
| [`receive`](/docs/contracts/protocol-fee-phase-adapter#receive) | permissionless |

## ReferralPayout

| Function | Access |
| --- | --- |
| [`claim`](/docs/contracts/referral-payout#claim) | permissionless |
| [`claimFor`](/docs/contracts/referral-payout#claimfor) | permissionless |
| [`notify`](/docs/contracts/referral-payout#notify) | hook-only (the immutable `hook` address set at construction; every other caller reverts `Unauthorized`) |
| [`receive`](/docs/contracts/referral-payout#receive) | permissionless |

## PunkVaultTitleAuction

| Function | Access |
| --- | --- |
| [`bid`](/docs/contracts/title-auction#bid) | permissionless (payable) |
| [`settle`](/docs/contracts/title-auction#settle) | permissionless |
| [`kickoff`](/docs/contracts/title-auction#kickoff) | permissionless, gated on the collected-trait threshold |
| [`mintTitle`](/docs/contracts/title-auction#minttitle) | permissionless, idempotent |
| [`withdrawRefund`](/docs/contracts/title-auction#withdrawrefund) | permissionless, pays msg.sender's own queued refund |
| [`withdrawProceeds`](/docs/contracts/title-auction#withdrawproceeds) | permissionless, funds always go to the credited recipient |
| [`withdrawProceeds`](/docs/contracts/title-auction#withdrawproceeds) | permissionless, pays msg.sender's own credit |

## PCSwapContext

| Function | Access |
| --- | --- |
| [`enterSwap`](/docs/contracts/pc-swap-context#enterswap) | extension-only (`msg.sender` must equal the current `authorizedExtension`, which must be non-zero; otherwise reverts `NotAuthorizedExtension`) |
| [`exitSwap`](/docs/contracts/pc-swap-context#exitswap) | extension-only (same gate as `enterSwap`) |
| [`setAuthorizedExtension`](/docs/contracts/pc-swap-context#setauthorizedextension) | owner-only (reverts `NotOwner` otherwise; reverts `AuthorizedExtensionAlreadyLocked` after the lock) |
| [`lockAuthorizedExtension`](/docs/contracts/pc-swap-context#lockauthorizedextension) | owner-only (reverts `NotOwner` otherwise; reverts `AuthorizedExtensionAlreadyLocked` if already locked) |
| [`transferOwnership`](/docs/contracts/pc-swap-context#transferownership) | owner-only (reverts `NotOwner` otherwise) |

## TokenAdminPoker

| Function | Access |
| --- | --- |
| [`setup`](/docs/contracts/token-admin-poker#setup) | owner-only, one-shot (reverts `AlreadySetup` on a second call) |
| [`bindExtension`](/docs/contracts/token-admin-poker#bindextension) | owner-only (reverts `NotOwner` otherwise; reverts `NotSetup` before `setup`) |
| [`lockExtension`](/docs/contracts/token-admin-poker#lockextension) | owner-only (reverts `NotOwner` otherwise; reverts `NotSetup` before `setup`) |
| [`setHookMaxReferralBps`](/docs/contracts/token-admin-poker#sethookmaxreferralbps) | two-key (either `owner` or the current `ProtocolAdmin.admin()` EOA; all other callers revert `NotAuthorized`; reverts `NotSetup` before `setup`) |
| [`setTokenTaxBps`](/docs/contracts/token-admin-poker#settokentaxbps) | two-key (either `owner` or the current `ProtocolAdmin.admin()` EOA; all other callers revert `NotAuthorized`; reverts `NotSetup` if the token isn't pinned yet) |
| [`transferOwnership`](/docs/contracts/token-admin-poker#transferownership) | owner-only (reverts `NotOwner` otherwise) |

## ProtocolAdmin

| Function | Access |
| --- | --- |
| [`transferAdmin`](/docs/contracts/protocol-admin#transferadmin) | admin-only (`msg.sender` must equal the current `admin`; any other caller reverts `NotAdmin`) |

## RendererRegistry

| Function | Access |
| --- | --- |
| [`setImplementation`](/docs/contracts/renderer-registry#setimplementation) | admin-only (`ProtocolAdmin.checkAdmin(msg.sender)` must be true, so the caller must hold the admin role with its 1-year timer unexpired) |
| [`freeze`](/docs/contracts/renderer-registry#freeze) | admin-only (`ProtocolAdmin.checkAdmin(msg.sender)`), one-way |

| Function | Access |
| --- | --- |
| [`cacheTrait`](/docs/contracts/mosaic-renderer#cachetrait) | permissionless |

| Function | Access |
| --- | --- |
| [`cachePunk`](/docs/contracts/punk-svg-fragment-cache#cachepunk) | permissionless |

| Function | Access |
| --- | --- |
| [`cacheTrait`](/docs/contracts/trait-icon-cache#cachetrait) | permissionless |
